title: New AI image generator BEATS EVERYTHING
summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is an AI image generator from OpenAI that handles a wide range of visual tasks including poster design, UI mockups, sprite sheets, and complex spatial reasoning. The tool demonstrates capabilities in text rendering, animation frame generation, diagram creation, and scene composition at scale.
